message:
refactor(cli): Extract CLI parsing into separate function with runtime selection

Introduces ParsedCli struct and parse_cli() function to separate command-line
parsing from execution. This enables runtime selection based on the command
type - search commands now use a single-threaded tokio runtime for reduced
overhead, while other commands continue using multi-threaded runtime.

Changes:
- Add ParsedCli struct to hold parsed CLI state
- Add parse_cli() function for argument parsing and normalization
- Add run_with_parsed() to execute with pre-parsed CLI
- Convert main() to non-async with explicit runtime construction
- Use current_thread runtime for search commands (lower latency)
- Improve error handling in main() with structured JSON output

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
